creator: fabian@wenks.ch
text:
Hello Lutz

For the Realtek PHY RTL8201CL ethernet have a look at the PR 
"amd64/110883: tested AMD 64 motherboard" [1], there is a patch in 
it. Seems to be a different system board but the same ethernet chip.

   [1] http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=110883


bye
Fabian
